# AI-Powered Skills Validation with Zero Disruption

Traditional skills validation is slow, biased, and disconnected from reality. iMocha’s AI-driven Skills Inference automates and updates employee skill profiles – silently, continuously, and at scale.

Book a Demo

A smiling man with floating labels Scalability, Trust, Accuracy, Automation, and Background.

## Outdated Skills Data Is Costing You

Organizations struggle to maintain accurate, up-to-date skills data. Traditional validation methods like manual check-ins, manager reviews, or self-assessments are time-consuming, biased, and unscalable. In today’s fast-changing workforce, you need continuous, AI-driven validation – without burdening employees or HR teams.

## Automate Skill Validation with Confidence

Skill Inference passively validates employee skills by analyzing resumes, certifications, learning history, and project data—requiring minimal time from employees while delivering continuous accuracy.

Minimal Employee Effort

Skill validation occurs automatically, with negligible manual input required.

.avif)

Trusted, Always-Current Data

Skills are constantly refreshed using verified, real-world signals.

.avif)

Scalable Across the Enterprise

Supports organization-wide validation without operational overhead.

## Background Skills Validation – Powered by AI

Runs silently to verify skills from trusted data sources. 

Our AI quietly verifies employee skills using signals from work, learning, and systems – no interruptions required.

Auto-extracts skills from resumes, projects, learning data, & certifications

Agentic AI filters, validates, and updates profiles behind the scenes

Minimal effort from employees or managers

Employee skill gap analysis dashboard with John Doe’s profile, performance chart, and progress bars.

Employee dashboard showing badges, certificates, and skill proficiency chart with gaps

## Real-Time Skills Refresh – Intelligent & Adaptive

Keeps skill profiles aligned with current capabilities. 

As employees grow, so do their skill profiles. AI continuously refreshes capabilities to reflect learning, role evolution, or project performance.

Detects evolving skills from day-to-day activities

Keeps profiles dynamically aligned to talent needs

## Enterprise-Ready Scalability – Plug, Play, & Scale

Flexible, low-effort deployment across large organizations. 

AI-powered Skills Inference adapts to enterprise systems and diverse user groups.

Low-maintenance deployment

Integrates easily with HR systems (SAP SuccessFactors, Workday, Oracle HCM)

Adapts to varied business units, geographies, and hierarchies

Employee profile cards showing ratings, badges, certificates, and resumes for comparison.

Adjacent skills diagram showing related skills connections.

## Adjacent Skills – Deeper Insights, Smarter Decisions

Enhance Talent Mapping with Enhanced Taxonomy. 

Our AI doesn’t just validate known skills – it infers adjacent and related capabilities that aren’t explicitly stated.

Identifies skill adjacencies based on context, role, and behavior

Expands your skills taxonomy with meaningful, role-relevant connections

Enables more accurate talent mapping, reskilling, and internal mobility

## What Makes iMocha Different?

100% background skill validation

Minimal employee time required

Works across global teams and systems

.avif)

Updates skills continuously and accurately

Pulls data from trusted, real-world sources

Enterprise-grade scalability

## Make Skills Discovery Effortless with AI-powered Inference

With iMocha’s AI Skills Inference, your organization gets real-time, verified skill data – automatically and at scale. Free up HR, empower employees, and let AI do the heavy lifting.

Book a Demo

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What is Upskilling?

Upskilling is strengthening current skills to stay competitive in evolving roles. For example: A software developer learning cloud computing to build scalable, future-ready applications. 

### What is Reskilling?

Reskilling is equipping employees with new skills to shift into different roles. For example: A React developer trained in Angular to contribute across diverse front-end frameworks. 

### Why is upskilling and reskilling critical in today’s workplace?

As job roles evolve rapidly, organizations must continuously align employee capabilities with business needs. Upskilling and reskilling reduce hiring costs, boost retention, and ensure workforce agility.

### How does iMocha personalize learning for different employees?

iMocha uses real-time skills data and AI to benchmark current capabilities, identify gaps, and recommend learning paths tailored to each individual’s role, potential, and career goals.

### Can iMocha integrate with our existing LMS or LXP?

Yes. iMocha integrates seamlessly with leading LMS, LXP, and HR systems to trigger contextual learning experiences within your existing ecosystem.

### How can we measure the success of a reskilling program?

With iMocha, you can track skill development progress, readiness scores, engagement levels, and business impact using intuitive dashboards and analytics.

### FAQs for Skills Inference

### What data sources does Skills Inference use to validate skills?

It pulls validated insights from resumes, project history, LMS data, certifications, and performance records. This multi-source approach ensures each skill is evidence-backed and contextually accurate.

### How does Skills Inference ensure data accuracy?

Skills Inference ensures data accuracy by aggregating skill data from multiple sources—such as resumes, certifications, projects, and learning history—and presenting it to the employee for review. The employee can then validate the inferred skills by accepting or rejecting them, creating a continuous feedback loop that enhances precision and reliability.

### Can this solution integrate with our existing HRMS/LMS systems?

Yes, it supports seamless integration with major HRMS, LMS, and talent systems. Deployment is low-effort and designed to scale easily across the enterprise.

### What kind of reporting and analytics does Skills Inference provide?

Skills Inference delivers real-time dashboards on skill gaps, workforce capabilities, internal mobility readiness, and training impact. It supports strategic planning through deep insights into talent distribution, adjacent skills, and upskilling opportunities.

### What are the measurable business outcomes of using Skills Inference?

Clients report faster & better internal mobility, and stronger skills visibility. It reduces HR effort while boosting engagement and workforce readiness.
